user_query: Show me a one-bowl dinner for Mother that's plant-based and light - something with grains and veggies all mixed together.

selected_nodes.name: Vegetable Soup & Bread — Garden Veg Variation
selected_nodes.short_description: A plant-forward combination of vegetable soup, whole grain bread, and a side salad for fiber, nutrients, and steady energy.
selected_nodes.meal_suggestion: Serve 1 cup of vegetable soup with 1 to 2 slices of whole grain bread and a side salad. For extra protein, add beans, lentils, or tofu to the soup or include a protein-rich topping on the salad.
selected_nodes.nutrition_note: Plant-forward, fiber-rich meal with vegetables, whole grains, and greens. High in dietary fiber and vitamins; provides moderate protein from soup and bread. To keep sodium in check, choose a low-sodium vegetable soup. Optional protein boost (beans, lentils, or tofu) can be added for more protein.
selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Mother > Day 4 > Dinner > Vegetable Soup & Bread — Garden Veg Variation
selected_nodes.reasoning: This is the most relevant option as it is explicitly described as 'plant-forward' and 'light,' featuring whole grains (bread) and vegetables. While served as soup and bread rather than a single bowl, it aligns with the nutritional and dietary requirements better than the meat-based options.

selected_nodes.name: Vegetable Soup & Bread — Citrus Fresh Twist
selected_nodes.short_description: A light, satisfying trio of vegetable soup, whole-grain bread, and a side salad with a citrus-inspired twist.
selected_nodes.meal_suggestion: Balanced light lunch option. For extra protein, add chickpeas, lentils, or a dollop of yogurt. To enhance the Citrus Fresh Twist, consider a citrus vinaigrette on the salad.
selected_nodes.nutrition_note: Fiber-rich from the vegetables and whole-grain bread; provides complex carbs, and vitamins/minerals with low saturated fat. Protein is modest; sodium depends on the soup—opt for a low-sodium option to support heart health. Side salad adds hydration and micronutrients.
selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Mother > Day 7 > Dinner > Vegetable Soup & Bread — Citrus Fresh Twist
selected_nodes.reasoning: Similar to candidate 3, this is a light, plant-based meal for Mother involving vegetables and whole grains. It fits the 'light' and 'plant-based' criteria requested.
